goal: Move the intelligence_server implementation behind the serving namespace while preserving the top-level module path through a compatibility wrapper.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Keep verification focused on import compatibility and serving entry points in this tranche
behavioral_changes: The real intelligence_server implementation now lives under chip_labs.intelligence_serving.
The old top-level intelligence_server module now acts as a compatibility wrapper.
The serving namespace API now imports refresh_skill and serve_context from the moved implementation directly.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.intelligence_server import serve_context, refresh_skill; from chip_labs.intelligence_serving.intelligence_server import serve_context as moved_serve_context; from chip_labs.intelligence_serving import serve_context as api_serve_context; import chip_labs.cli; print('intelligence-server-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: If serving-surface cleanup continues, chip_runtime.py is the next high-leverage move but it needs cycle-aware handling.
Keep compatibility wrappers until the serving dependency graph is stable behind the namespace.
